issues.detail: The skill does not fully handle error scenarios such as token expiration, CSRF token fetching, or network failures.
The skill is limited to Node.js environments and does not support other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: Shopify webhook to S/4HANA sales order
scenarios.rationale: Treatment performs the OAuth2 client_credentials token exchange, fetches and sends X-CSRF-Token on POST, and posts to /API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrder with the documented to_Item field names; baseline invents a generic /api/sales/orders endpoint with Basic auth and no CSRF.

scenarios.name: Cron-based sales order polling to analytics
scenarios.rationale: Treatment polls every 5 minutes and queries A_SalesOrder with $filter on CreationDate, $expand=to_Item, $select and $top; baseline invents a non-OData /sales/orders?since= endpoint with no $expand or field selection.
